summary: Completed E2E testing of Profile Tab restructure feature. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Top 5 Favorite Movies at top with auto-save, read-only ranked genres/actors/directors with TMDB images, empty state messages shown correctly. No Save button present (auto-save working).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/user/profile-insights returns 200 for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/user/profile-insights returns 401 without authentication
Backend: Each genre item has name, score, count, avg_rating fields
Backend: Each actor item has name, score, count, avg_rating, profile_path fields
Backend: Each director item has name, score, count, avg_rating, profile_path fields
Backend: Actors have profile_path images from TMDB (at least some)
Backend: Directors have profile_path images from TMDB (at least some)
Backend: Returns max 5 items per category (top 5 ranking)
Backend: Returns empty arrays when user has no watch history
Backend: Genres are sorted by score (descending)
Backend: PUT /api/auth/profile accepts favorite_movies array
Backend: favorite_movies is limited to 5 items
Backend: favorite_movies returned on login
Frontend: Profile tab shows Top 5 Favorite Movies section at the top
Frontend: Top 5 Movies auto-saves when adding a movie (no Save button)
Frontend: Top 5 Movies auto-saves when removing a movie
Frontend: Profile tab shows read-only Top Genres section with ranked items
Frontend: Profile tab shows read-only Top Actors section with profile images
Frontend: Profile tab shows read-only Top Directors section with profile images
Frontend: Genre/Actor/Director sections show 'Not enough watch data yet' when empty
Frontend: Each ranked item shows rank number, name, movie count, avg rating
critical_code_review_comments: Backend profile-insights endpoint correctly fetches TMDB details and credits in parallel
Scoring algorithm: weight = avg_rating * (1 + 0.1 * (watch_count - 1)) for slight rewatch boost
Frontend RankedList component correctly handles empty state with 'Not enough watch data yet'
Auto-save implemented via saveMovies() function called immediately on add/remove
Profile images rendered using TMDB path: `https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/w45${profile_path}`
No Save Profile button - all changes auto-saved
test_credentials: lbtest@example.com / test1234 (has 4 diary entries with TMDB data for ranked insights)
seed_data_creation: Empty profile test user created via API for empty state verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Tab restructure fully tested. Key features: 1) Top 5 Favorite Movies at top (user-editable, auto-saves), 2) Top Genres/Actors/Directors are read-only ranked lists from watch history via GET /api/user/profile-insights. Actors/directors show TMDB profile images. Empty state shows 'Not enough watch data yet'. No Save button - auto-save on add/remove. Test user: lbtest@example.com has Parasite, Whiplash, Fight Club, Moonlight in diary.
